name: com.example/hosted-mcp
description: Example provider-hosted MCP endpoint for remote-ref authoring.

tenant_id.description: Provider tenant slug or account id used in the hosted MCP URL.

ai.quickdeploy.registry/auth.notes: Use static headers only for provider-documented API tokens. Runtime OAuth should be discovered by the MCP client and documented here instead of encoded as a static secret.

ai.quickdeploy.registry/review.notes: Replace this template with provider-specific endpoint, auth, ToS, and stability evidence before publishing.
